title: glyceria distans subsp. parlatorei
intro: Glyceria distans subsp. parlatorei, also known as Parlatore's mannagrass, is a subspecies of the Glyceria distans plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Glyceria distans subsp. parlatorei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
